race.comment: LIKA REMI (5) booted up from a low draw to stalk the pace and lifted to score a gutsy win by a long neck at Tuncurry over 1305m last time out. Will be tough to rein in again. SHE'S A WILD ONE (7) hit the frame two starts ago at this track but ran below par last time when 11th and beaten 4 lengths over 950m at Moree after being in contention on the bend. Finds a suitable assignment and can get the job done. STIORRA (8) was narrowly beaten at a huge quote last time out, finishing fourth over 1000m at Tamworth. Should be involved in the finish again. SKATES ON (9) has been out of the winner's list for a long time, last start finishing fourth at Tuncurry over 1005m after being handy for much of the way. Best figures measure up nicely. One of the chances.
